text:

LENGTH:

SOURCE:

FILE(S): 
OT header

Simplification/NationalProvIdentStand/ 
Null/missing = Source value is missing or unknown 
COMMENT: 
This variable has been retired; therefore, the field is blank starting with the 2023 Release 1 RIF. 
Values and websites referenced may change over time.
